pi_items.source: Task description and setup script confirm this save path

InVesalius official documentation lists bone window preset as Contrast=300 (W=300), not 406. Standard bone windows in radiology are W=1800-3000. However, 406 HU is consistent with soft tissue window widths (350-400 HU). The labeling as 'bone window' is contradicted by official InVesalius presets and standard radiology terminology.

InVesalius official documentation specifies Brain tissue preset with Contrast=40 (window width) and Brightness=80 (window level). Medical imaging literature confirms brain CT windows at approximately W=80, L=40.
README.md explicitly states 'acceptable range: W 30–250'. Verifier code checks `window_width <= 250.0` as criterion for task success.
README.md lists soft tissue presets: 'Soft Tissue (−700 to 225 HU), Muscle Tissue (−5 to 135 HU)'. All soft tissue masks have maximum HU ≤ 300. Verifier checks `threshold_max <= 300`.

setup_invesalius.sh downloads from 'https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip' and stores in /opt/invesalius/sample_data/ct_cranium. setup_task.sh links this to /home/ga/DICOM/ct_cranium. The series is the official InVesalius 0051 CT Cranium sample dataset.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses the official InVesalius 0051 CT Cranium dataset, a publicly available real medical imaging sample from the InVesalius v3.0 release. The task requires adjusting window width to approximately 80 HU and window level to 40 HU (brain soft-tissue window preset per official InVesalius documentation), creating a soft tissue segmentation mask with maximum HU threshold of 300, and saving the project to /home/ga/Documents/brain_study.inv3. The verifier checks that the final window width is ≤250 HU (representing the acceptable brain window range of 30-250 HU) and that at least one mask exists with threshold_max ≤ 300 HU.
